summary: Full backend+frontend testing for BRANE Social layer. 45/45 pytest backend tests passed covering all social endpoints, customization (public + admin), social ads CRUD, and marketplace routes still intact. Frontend /entry renders beautifully with 2 cards, admin login works, /admin has Global/Social tab with full customization UI (Rede Social / Marketplace / Perfis / Anúncios Sociais sub-tabs), /social feed loads, post creation works end-to-end, profile page renders.

issues: React warning in console: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (AuthPage)' - likely a navigate() called during render instead of inside useEffect. Non-blocking but should be fixed.

action_items: (Optional) Fix React setState-during-render warning in AuthPage.js: move the post-login redirect into a useEffect that watches the auth state, instead of calling navigate() directly inside the render body.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2483 lines - should be modularized (routers for social, customization, marketplace, admin) per >700 lines guideline.
Social ad rotation inside /api/social/feed works but 'views' counter on ads is never incremented when served in feed; consider +1 per impression.
Notifications collection is shared between marketplace and social; filtering by regex ^social_ is fine but may be slow at scale without an index.
Follow/unfollow endpoint returns 'following: false' on unfollow but does NOT create the reverse notification cleanup; minor.
/api/social/posts/{id}/share only increments counter - no share record is persisted, so per-user share listing is impossible.
Empty story without media rejected correctly, but no file-size / MIME validation on media field (accepts any string).
test_credentials: admin@brane.com / Admin123!  |  maria@test.com / test1234 (auto-registered if missing)
seed_data_creation: Registered maria@test.com / test1234 automatically via /api/auth/register during tests. Startup seed already creates admin@brane.com / Admin123!.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_social_and_customization.py as regression suite. conftest.py logs in admin + registers/logs-in maria automatically. All social endpoints, customization endpoints and social ads CRUD pass. Marketplace endpoints (/api/products, /api/admin/dashboard, /api/admin/theme, /api/categories) remain intact. Frontend flow verified: /entry -> /auth login -> /admin Global/Social tab -> /social feed -> create post -> profile page. Only non-blocking finding is a React setState-during-render warning on AuthPage.
rca of the issue: No critical issues. Minor console warning on AuthPage is caused by calling navigate() or setState on a parent router inside render body instead of useEffect. Fix: wrap redirect logic in useEffect.
